case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CANDIDO MAURICIO ULLOA PADILLA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-17-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT CANDIDO MAURICIO ULLOA PADILLA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARA SANDBERG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED FEB-13-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA PADILLA, CANDIDO MAURICIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA PADILLA, CANDIDO MAURICIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT CANDIDO MAURICIO ULLOA PADILLA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ULLOA PADILLA, CANDIDO MAURICIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
